title.en: The Twelve PAC MAC Commands: A Field-Level Walkthrough (Clause 7.5)
title.zh: 十二个 PAC MAC 命令：字段级逐条精讲（Clause 7.5）

blocks.en: In IEEE 802.15.8 — the Peer Aware Communications (PAC) standard — devices talk directly to one another instead of through an access point. Each such device is a PD (Peer-aware Device). Clause 7.5 (MAC commands) defines the small, fixed catalogue of control messages PDs use to find each other, link up, share airtime, and exchange keys. A MAC command (Medium Access Control command) is just a special frame whose payload begins with a one-octet command identifier (ID). The MAC software layer, the MLME (MAC Sublayer Management Entity), builds each command in response to a service request from the layer above (a 'primitive'). This lesson walks every command in 7.5.1 through 7.5.13, field by field.
blocks.zh: 在 IEEE 802.15.8（对等感知通信，PAC 标准）中，设备彼此直接通信，而不经过接入点。每个这样的设备称为 PD（对等感知设备）。Clause 7.5（MAC 命令）定义了一个小而固定的控制消息目录，PD 用它们来相互发现、建立连接、共享空口时间并交换密钥。MAC 命令（媒体访问控制命令）就是一种特殊的帧，其负载以一个八位字节的命令标识符（ID）开头。MAC 软件层 MLME（MAC 子层管理实体）会根据上层的服务请求（即原语）来构建每条命令。本课将逐字段讲解 7.5.1 到 7.5.13 中的每一条命令。

blocks.en: Clause 7.5.1 (Overview) gives the master directory: Table 23 maps command IDs to names. ID 1 = Discovery Request, 2 = Discovery Response, 3 = Peering Request, 4 = Peering Response, 5 = De-peering Notification, 6 = Reassignment, 7 = RE Request, 8 = RE Response, 9 = RE Notification, 10 = Cyclic-superframe Advertise Request, 11 = Public Key Request, 12 = Public Key Response. ID 0 and IDs 13–255 are Reserved. Every command shares the same skeleton: a MAC Header (MHR), then a command-specific Content field. Each subclause below describes that command's 'Relevant MHR fields' (addressing and flags) and its 'Relevant MAC Payload field' (the Content layout).
blocks.zh: Clause 7.5.1（概述）给出了主目录：表 23 将命令 ID 映射到名称。ID 1 = 发现请求，2 = 发现响应，3 = 配对请求，4 = 配对响应，5 = 解除配对通知，6 = 重新分配，7 = RE 请求，8 = RE 响应，9 = RE 通知，10 = 循环超帧通告请求，11 = 公钥请求，12 = 公钥响应。ID 0 与 ID 13–255 为保留。每条命令共享同一骨架：一个 MAC 头部（MHR），其后是命令特有的内容（Content）字段。下面每个子条款都会描述该命令的“相关 MHR 字段”（寻址与标志）以及“相关 MAC 负载字段”（Content 布局）。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 640 90" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="10" y="30" width="150" height="34"/><text x="85" y="52" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">MAC Header (MHR)</text><rect x="160" y="30" width="110" height="34"/><text x="215" y="52" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">Command ID</text><rect x="270" y="30" width="260" height="34"/><text x="400" y="52" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">Content field (per command)</text><rect x="530" y="30" width="100" height="34"/><text x="580" y="52" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle">FCS</text><text x="320" y="20" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">MAC command frame skeleton</text></svg>

caption.en: Every 7.5 command rides in the same envelope: MHR + a one-octet command ID + a command-specific Content field. 7.5.1's Table 23 lists which ID maps to which command.
caption.zh: 7.5 中每条命令都装在同一个信封里：MHR + 一个八位字节的命令 ID + 命令特有的 Content 字段。7.5.1 的表 23 列出了 ID 与命令的对应关系。

blocks.en: Discovery comes first. The Discovery Request command (7.5.2) is sent by the MLME after an MLME-DISCOVERY.request primitive to fish for other PDs' discovery information. Its address-mode (DAM) field can be a MAC address (one target), a multicast address (a PAC group), or broadcast (everyone); an Immediate Ack is requested only for a unicast target. Its Content carries a 'List of PDs present' bit and, optionally, a list of PDs to ask about. The Discovery Response command (7.5.3) is the reply: the Responder PD returns its discovery information, prefixed by a Status field (0 = Success, 1 = Denied). On Denied, the Discovery Information is left empty.
blocks.zh: 首先是发现过程。发现请求命令（7.5.2）由 MLME 在收到 MLME-DISCOVERY.request 原语后发出，用以探寻其他 PD 的发现信息。它的地址模式字段（DAM）可以是 MAC 地址（单一目标）、多播地址（一个 PAC 组）或广播（所有人）；只有对单播目标才请求立即确认（Immediate Ack）。其 Content 携带一个“List of PDs present”比特，并可选地携带一份要查询的 PD 列表。发现响应命令（7.5.3）是回复：响应方 PD 返回自己的发现信息，前面带一个状态字段（0 = 成功，1 = 拒绝）。若为拒绝，则发现信息字段留空。

blocks.en: Then comes linking. The Peering Request command (7.5.4) asks to 'peer' (form a link) with one PD (UNICAST), many PDs (BROADCAST), or a whole group (MULTICAST) — a 2-bit Request Type field encodes which. Its Content is the richest in the clause: flags like 'New Channel Page' and 'Frame Pending' (for splitting a long PD list across several frames, counted by Frame Count), a desired Group ID and optional Application ID, a Channel Page / Channel Number proposal, a PHY Capability field (Table 26: OFDM, OFDMA, GFSK, UWB modes), and a Key Descriptor so a public key can ride along. The Peering Response command (7.5.5) answers with a Status field whose six values (Table 27) say exactly why a request was granted or refused — including granular reasons like 'Request of new channel number in the current channel page denied'. If a new channel is granted, the Requestor acknowledges on the old channel but moves to the new one for everything after.
blocks.zh: 接下来是建链。配对请求命令（7.5.4）请求与一个 PD（UNICAST）、多个 PD（BROADCAST）或整个组（MULTICAST）“配对”（建立链路）——一个 2 比特的 Request Type 字段编码了具体方式。它的 Content 是本条款中最丰富的：包含“New Channel Page”和“Frame Pending”等标志（用于将长 PD 列表拆分到多个帧中，由 Frame Count 计数）、期望的 Group ID 和可选的 Application ID、信道页/信道号建议、PHY Capability 字段（表 26：OFDM、OFDMA、GFSK、UWB 模式），以及一个密钥描述符，使公钥可随帧携带。配对响应命令（7.5.5）以一个状态字段作答，其六个取值（表 27）精确说明请求被批准或拒绝的原因——包括“拒绝在当前信道页中使用新信道号”等细粒度原因。若批准了新信道，请求方在旧信道上确认，但此后的一切都改用新信道。

blocks.en: A useful mental grouping: 7.5.2/7.5.3 are the discovery pair, 7.5.4/7.5.5 are the peering pair, 7.5.6 tears a link down, 7.5.7 reconfigures a live link, 7.5.8/7.5.9/7.5.10 manage CFP airtime (request / response / broadcast notice), 7.5.11 advertises the cyclic-superframe schedule, and 7.5.12/7.5.13 are the key-exchange pair. Eight of the twelve come in request/response couples.
blocks.zh: 一个有用的记忆分组：7.5.2/7.5.3 是发现对，7.5.4/7.5.5 是配对对，7.5.6 拆除链路，7.5.7 重配置在用链路，7.5.8/7.5.9/7.5.10 管理 CFP 空口时间（请求/响应/广播通告），7.5.11 通告循环超帧时间表，7.5.12/7.5.13 是密钥交换对。十二条命令中有八条成对出现（请求/响应）。

blocks.en:
sequenceDiagram
  participant R as Requestor PD
  participant S as Responder PD
  R->>S: Discovery Request (7.5.2)
  S-->>R: Discovery Response (7.5.3)
  R->>S: Peering Request (7.5.4)
  S-->>R: Peering Response (7.5.5)
  R->>S: Public Key Request (7.5.12)
  S-->>R: Public Key Response (7.5.13)
  R->>S: RE Request (7.5.8)
  S-->>R: RE Response (7.5.9)
blocks.zh:
sequenceDiagram
  participant R as 请求方 PD
  participant S as 响应方 PD
  R->>S: 发现请求 (7.5.2)
  S-->>R: 发现响应 (7.5.3)
  R->>S: 配对请求 (7.5.4)
  S-->>R: 配对响应 (7.5.5)
  R->>S: 公钥请求 (7.5.12)
  S-->>R: 公钥响应 (7.5.13)
  R->>S: RE 请求 (7.5.8)
  S-->>R: RE 响应 (7.5.9)

blocks.en: Three commands keep an established link healthy. The De-peering Notification command (7.5.6) is the clean teardown: a Requestor PD sends it to drop a peer or leave a PAC group; its Content field is empty — the act of sending it is the whole message. The Reassignment command (7.5.7) is sent when something must change mid-session: a multicast group address that conflicts, or a channel page/number that has grown noisy (rising PER — Packet Error Rate — or collision probability). Its Content carries presence bits plus the new Multicast Address and/or new Channel Number and Channel Page, which the receiving PD stores into its PIB (PAN Information Base, the device's parameter store).
blocks.zh: 有三条命令负责维护已建立的链路。解除配对通知命令（7.5.6）是干净的拆链：请求方 PD 发送它以断开某个对端或退出某个 PAC 组；其 Content 字段为空——发送这一动作本身就是全部消息。重新分配命令（7.5.7）在会话中途必须变更时发出：例如发生冲突的多播组地址，或已变得嘈杂的信道页/信道号（PER（包错误率）或碰撞概率上升）。其 Content 携带存在标志位以及新的多播地址和/或新的信道号与信道页，接收 PD 会将其存入自己的 PIB（PAN 信息库，即设备的参数存储区）。

blocks.en: Airtime in PAC is reserved as REs (Resource Elements) inside the CFP (Contention-Free Period) — scheduled slots free of random contention. The RE Request command (7.5.8) asks for a number of REs, tagged with a Direction (transmit or receive), a Priority (Table 28: Low / Normal / High / Emergency), and an Allocation bit (allocate vs. deallocate); it carries the requesting PD's current schedule as a CFP Table (the macCFPtable, each row five integers: a LinkIndex plus start and finish (i,j) indices). The RE Response command (7.5.9) returns a Status (0 = Success, 1 = fewer REs available than requested, 2 = Denied), the assigned Link Index, and the responder's own CFP Table. The RE Notification command (7.5.10) is broadcast (no destination, security off) the instant a PD updates its macCFPtable, so neighbours always see the current state of CFP allocation.
blocks.zh: 在 PAC 中，空口时间以 CFP（无竞争期，即不含随机竞争的预约时隙）内的 RE（资源单元）形式预约。RE 请求命令（7.5.8）请求若干个 RE，并标注方向（Direction：发送或接收）、优先级（表 28：低/普通/高/紧急）以及分配比特（Allocation：分配或解除分配）；它携带请求 PD 当前的时间表，即 CFP 表（macCFPtable，每行五个整数：一个 LinkIndex 加上起始与结束的 (i,j) 索引）。RE 响应命令（7.5.9）返回状态（0 = 成功，1 = 可用 RE 少于请求数，2 = 拒绝）、分配到的 Link Index 以及响应方自己的 CFP 表。RE 通知命令（7.5.10）在 PD 一更新其 macCFPtable 时立即广播（无目的地址、关闭安全），使邻居始终看到 CFP 分配的最新状态。

blocks.en: Finally, scheduling and keys. The Cyclic-superframe Advertise Request command (7.5.11) is broadcast by the PD that owns a cyclic-superframe to publish its repeating schedule (size, pattern-A count and types, sequence number) inside a Cyclic-superframe descriptor IE; sent periodically during the peering period, its own Content field is empty. The Public Key Request command (7.5.12) and Public Key Response command (7.5.13) implement the Extended Diffie-Hellman (E-DH) key agreement of Clause 16.5 — a way for two parties to derive a shared secret over an open channel. A Request Type field selects the mode (Table 30: Pairwise, Group, or New keys); the request can carry a Key Descriptor plus probe Encrypted Data, or — once E-DH has run — an encrypted group key (GK). The response reports a Status (Table 31: Success, Decryption failed, MIC check failed; MIC = Message Integrity Code) and, for 'New keys', returns the Responder's own public-key descriptor.
blocks.zh: 最后是调度与密钥。循环超帧通告请求命令（7.5.11）由拥有某循环超帧的 PD 广播，以发布其重复时间表（大小、模式 A 数量与类型、序列号），承载在循环超帧描述符 IE 中；在配对期内周期性发送，其自身 Content 字段为空。公钥请求命令（7.5.12）与公钥响应命令（7.5.13）实现了 Clause 16.5 的扩展 Diffie-Hellman（E-DH）密钥协商——一种让双方在开放信道上推导共享密钥的方法。一个 Request Type 字段选择模式（表 30：成对密钥、组密钥或新密钥）；请求可携带密钥描述符加探测用的加密数据，或在 E-DH 运行完成后携带加密的组密钥（GK）。响应报告状态（表 31：成功、解密失败、MIC 校验失败；MIC = 消息完整性码），并在“新密钥”模式下返回响应方自己的公钥描述符。

summary.en: Coverage map — exact clause numbers for all twelve commands (7.5.1–7.5.13)
summary.zh: 覆盖地图——全部十二条命令的精确条款编号（7.5.1–7.5.13）

blocks.en: 7.5.1 Overview — the command-ID directory (Table 23, IDs 0–12 plus reserved). 7.5.2 Discovery Request — MLME-DISCOVERY.request; DAM = MAC/multicast/broadcast; Content has List-of-PDs-present bit. 7.5.3 Discovery Response — returns discovery info with Status (Success/Denied). 7.5.4 Peering Request — Request Type UNICAST/BROADCAST/MULTICAST; flags (List of PDs, App ID, New Channel Page, Frame Pending), Frame Count, Group ID, Application ID, Channel Page/Number, PHY Capability (Table 26), Key Descriptor. 7.5.5 Peering Response — six-value Status (Table 27), Multicast Address Present, Channel Number fallback, Key Descriptor. 7.5.6 De-peering Notification — empty Content; tears down a peer/group link. 7.5.7 Reassignment — new Multicast Address and/or Channel Number/Page stored to the PIB. 7.5.8 RE Request — Length, Direction, Priority (Table 28), Allocation, Allocation Live, CFP Table (macCFPtable rows). 7.5.9 RE Response — Status (Table 29), Link Index, CFP Table. 7.5.10 RE Notification — broadcast CFP Table after every macCFPtable update; SEC = 0, no destination. 7.5.11 Cyclic-superframe Advertise Request — broadcast cyclic-superframe descriptor IE; empty Content. 7.5.12 Public Key Request — E-DH (Clause 16.5); Request Type Pairwise/Group/New keys (Table 30); Key Descriptor + Encrypted Data / group key GK. 7.5.13 Public Key Response — Status (Table 31: Success/Decryption failed/MIC check failed); returns Key Descriptor for New keys.
blocks.zh: 7.5.1 概述——命令 ID 目录（表 23，ID 0–12 及保留）。7.5.2 发现请求——MLME-DISCOVERY.request；DAM = MAC/多播/广播；Content 含 List-of-PDs-present 比特。7.5.3 发现响应——返回发现信息并带状态（成功/拒绝）。7.5.4 配对请求——Request Type 为 UNICAST/BROADCAST/MULTICAST；标志（List of PDs、App ID、New Channel Page、Frame Pending）、Frame Count、Group ID、Application ID、信道页/号、PHY Capability（表 26）、密钥描述符。7.5.5 配对响应——六值状态（表 27）、Multicast Address Present、信道号回退、密钥描述符。7.5.6 解除配对通知——Content 为空；拆除对端/组链路。7.5.7 重新分配——新多播地址和/或信道号/页，存入 PIB。7.5.8 RE 请求——Length、Direction、Priority（表 28）、Allocation、Allocation Live、CFP 表（macCFPtable 行）。7.5.9 RE 响应——状态（表 29）、Link Index、CFP 表。7.5.10 RE 通知——每次更新 macCFPtable 后广播 CFP 表；SEC = 0，无目的地址。7.5.11 循环超帧通告请求——广播循环超帧描述符 IE；Content 为空。7.5.12 公钥请求——E-DH（Clause 16.5）；Request Type 为成对/组/新密钥（表 30）；密钥描述符 + 加密数据/组密钥 GK。7.5.13 公钥响应——状态（表 31：成功/解密失败/MIC 校验失败）；新密钥模式返回密钥描述符。

blocks.en: Notice the recurring building blocks across commands: the same Key Descriptor (Key Cipher Suite, Key Type, Elliptic Curve, Key Data) appears in Peering Request/Response and both Public Key commands; the same CFP Table (macCFPtable) layout appears in all three RE commands. Learn these shared sub-structures once and most of Clause 7.5 reads as variations on a theme.
blocks.zh: 请注意命令之间反复出现的构件：同一个密钥描述符（Key Cipher Suite、Key Type、Elliptic Curve、Key Data）出现在配对请求/响应及两条公钥命令中；同一个 CFP 表（macCFPtable）布局出现在全部三条 RE 命令中。把这些共享子结构学透一次，Clause 7.5 的大部分内容便可视为同一主题的变体。

cites.note: 7.5.1 Overview and Table 23 MAC command IDs.
7.5.2 Discovery Request and 7.5.3 Discovery Response (Status Table 24).
7.5.4 Peering Request (Request Type Table 25, PHY Capability Table 26).
7.5.7 Reassignment Content and 7.5.8 RE Request (Priority Table 28).
7.5.10 RE Notification and 7.5.11 Cyclic-superframe Advertise Request.
7.5.12 Public Key Request (Request Type Table 30) and start of 7.5.13.
